Rachael Hall DipPFS Cert CII (Life & Pensions)

Multi Award-Winning Independent Financial Adviser, NHS Pension Specialist, Coach and Expert Witness.

As Seen In

How can I help you?

Access Regulated Independent Financial Advice

If you need personal advice, you’ll be directed to Seven Stars Private Wealth, Rachael’s separate FCA-regulated advice firm.

Explore Courses, Programmes & Coaching

Articles, courses and resources on money, retirement, pensions, wealth psychology and financial wellbeing.

Navigating the NHS Pension Scheme

Specialist reports and services for NHS professionals, advisers and legal professionals.

THE TRUTH ABOUT FINANCIAL WELLBEING

After more than twenty years of managing client money, I have sat with people at almost every point on the financial spectrum. What I have witnessed over those years has changed not only how I understand money, but how I understand wealth itself. Ultimately, I believe financial wellbeing is more accessible than most people realise. For many people, though, it begins with dismantling the assumptions we have been taught about money, and learning to tune into a new frequency.

4.9 stars by 102 customers

Source: VouchedFor

“Had my initial meeting with Rachael which was fab. I felt really reassured and confident that Rachael and her team were the experts I needed! So much so that I ended up cancelling another meeting I had scheduled with another potential company. I have high expectations of the work and that Rachael will more than meet them. Such a lovely vibe from Rachael too - so down to earth and understanding.”

Dr. F - Tyne & Wear - 03/12/2025

“Rachael is a rarity in my experience, hugely experienced, superb clear financial advice but unlike many her emotional intelligence and empathy shines through. Financial advice is not just about understanding cold hard numbers (at which she is excellent) but it’s about listening and understanding the person. I wanted someone who was human and i could relate to for my advice , i got that in bucket loads and shrewd , balanced, highly knowledgeable and top notch financial advice as well.”

Dr. W. - Lake District - 21/12/2024

“Rachael has for more than 15 years provided excellent advice for me in the complex world of NHS pensions, including annual allowance tax risk and more recently draw down of my pension and deferred sums.”

Professor A. - CEO - 04.12.25

“Never let the quest for more distract you from the beauty of enough.”

— Sahil Bloom
